title: More Than 1 Million Migrants Apply for Legal Status in Spain
summary_full: Since late April, the Spanish government has allowed undocumented migrants a path out of legal limbo, making Spain a beacon to the global left.
summary_public: Since late April, the Spanish government has allowed undocumented migrants a path out of legal limbo, making Spain a beacon to the global left.

ES.label: positive
ES.evidence: Spanish government has allowed undocumented migrants a path out of legal limbo
